/Users/gvelarde/Downloads/kaax-landing/b.serviceRawFile:
service: kaax-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: ${env:AWS_REGION, 'us-east-1'}
  architecture: arm64  # Graviton2 - más barato y rápido
  memorySize: 256
  timeout: 10
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: production
    DATABASE_URL: ${env:DATABASE_URL}
    STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: ${env:STRIPE_SECRET_KEY}
    STRIPE_SECRET_KEY_PROD: ${env:STRIPE_SECRET_KEY_PROD, ''}
    STRIPE_PRICE_ID: ${env:STRIPE_PRICE_ID}
    STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PROD: ${env:STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PROD, ''}
    STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${env:STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET}
    STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET_PROD: ${env:STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET_PROD, ''}
    FRONTEND_URL: ${env:FRONTEND_URL, 'https://kaax.ai'}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - logs:CreateLogGroup
            - logs:CreateLogStream
            - logs:PutLogEvents
          Resource: '*'

functions:
  api:
    handler: dist/index.handler
    url:
      cors:
        allowedOrigins:
          - ${env:FRONTEND_URL, 'https://kaax.ai'}
          - http://localhost:3000
        allowedHeaders:
          - Content-Type
          - Authorization
          - stripe-signature
        allowedMethods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        allowCredentials: true
    events:
      - httpApi: '*'

package:
  patterns:
    - '!**'
    - 'dist/**'

plugins:
  - serverless-offline  # Para testing local

custom:
  serverless-offline:
    httpPort: 8787
